characters.name: Abby Martin
characters.description: Abigail "Abby" MartinFull nameAbigail MartinNickname(s)Abby (by everyone)Traitor (byK.C.)Nerd (by K.C.)Smart Mouth (byErica)Miss Thing (by Erica)GenderFemaleDate of birthOctober 5, 1997Age19Resides inOld abandoned hospital (formerly) Organisation Prison Cell Arlington, VirginiaOccupationThe Other Side SpyCollege StudentEye colorBrownHair colorBlack with brown highlightsFamilyErica King(mother)Richard Martin(father)Kira Cooper(aunt; disowned)Craig Cooper(uncle; disowned)K.C. Cooper(cousin; disowned)Ernie Cooper(cousin; disowned)Judy Cooper(robotic cousin; disowned)Gayle King(maternal grandmother; disowned)Othello King(maternal grandfather; disowned)FriendsZane WillisThe Other SideEnemiesK.C. CooperKira CooperCraig CooperErnie CooperMarisa MillerDarienSchoolHoward UniversityAffiliationsThe Other SideFirst seenDo You Want to Know a SecretLast seenFamily FeudPortrayed byKara Royster Abigail "Abby" Martinis a recurring character and a major antagonist inSeason 2ofK.C. Undercover. Her first appearance was inDo You Want to Know a Secret. She is portrayed by Kara Royster. Abby seems nice at first, but once K.C. learned that she worked for The Other Side, her true colors were revealed. She is the daughter ofRichard Martin, the former head of The Other Side, and is very mean and manipulative, even going so far as to hurt her family in order to complete a mission. Abby, being a spy, has a talent for hiding her true intentions. She quickly gained K.C.’s trust using a semi-false backstory and successfully used her intelligence to trick K.C. and Kira into taking her to Erica. She also has cunning and intuition, which proved to be useful to her in the beginning. She seems to have a deep loyalty for the Other Side, given that she was raised in its ranks. Abby has demonstrated a mean streak following the episode (“Accidents Will Happen”).  She declares that she was born only to be bad, even saying herself that she isn’t the “sweet little orphan girl [she] pretended to be.” Because of her cheeky comments, it’s been said by Erica and KC that she is a smart mouth. She is also quite egotistical, proclaiming herself to be special without giving an actual reason.

characters.name: Agent Johnson
characters.description: Agent JohnsonFull nameAgent JohnsonNickname(s)Sir (by Agent Gibb &K.C.)The MaskMask (byBrady)GenderMaleResides inWashington D.C.The Organization'sPrisonOccupationSpyAgent Of The Organization (formerly)CriminalEye colorHazel (Green & Brown)Hair colorGrey/BlackRomancesNoneFriendsK.C. Cooper(formerly)Ernie Cooper(formerly)Judy Cooper(formerly)Craig Cooper(formerly)Kira Cooper(formerly)Gayle King(formerly)Othello King(formerly)Beverly(formerly)Agent McKenzie(formerly)Agent Garcia(formerly)Agent Wally(formerly)Howard Morris(formerly)Brady(formerly)Amy BishopDanielle BishopMitch BishopEnemiesErica KingAbby MartinRichard MartinBrett WillisZane WillisVictorThe JackalUrsula TimmcoyCandace AdamsAgent GibbThe Other SideJane KellerThe VolunteensCooper FamilyBradyThe AlternateMitch Bishop(Formerly)Danielle Bishop(Formerly)BeverlyAgent McKenzieAgent GarciaAgent WallyHoward MorrisAmy Bishop(formerly)SchoolSpy TrainingAffiliationsThe Organization(formerly)First seenMy Sister from Another Mother... BoardLast seenK.C. Undercover: The Final ChapterPortrayed byRick Hall Agent Johnsonis a recurring character onK.C. Undercover. He was a spy that worked forThe Organization. He was continually involved in the Coopers' spy life and has made an increasing amount of appearances in the show's second season. He has also been involved in some of the most memorable times in the series such as Kira being arrested; Ernie becoming a spy;The Jackalcoming back for revenge and the Martin family situation. He makes ongoing appearances in the series and has now made an appearance in all three seasons of K.C. Undercover thus far. He was revealed to be The Mask inK.C. Undercover: The Final Chapteras well as the main antagonist of the series finale. Agent Johnson has nearly kicked K.C. out ofThe Organizationfor taking Ernie on and thus failing a mission. He has reported to Craig about a dangerous werewolf serum that creates genetically modified super soldiers that theOther Sideis handing off. He has arrested Kira Cooper for the alleged destroying of The Organization's field office in Hong Kong. He has monitored the situation on Abby, Erica, and Richard by planting bugs, gathering information, going undercover, and committing various initiatives to try and capture Abby, Erica, and most notably the head of theOther Side. He has interrogated Kira on information about her sister. He has apprehended a preacher who was an agent for the other side working deep cover. He has also awarded K.C. with the honor of being the youngest junior-senior special agent ever by testing her and back-checking her. Lastly, he has given the Coopers an opportunity to rejoinThe Organizationby asking them to capture,The Jackal. Agent Johnson has reported to K.C. about Jane Keller from "In too Deep". He gave K.C. the necessary information about Keller and thus sent K.C. on a mission to go undercover in the better earth cafe and the Volunteens, which are both owned by Keller. Most recently, he has reported to Craig th

Most recently, he has reported to Craig that an ambassador from the fictional nation of Monvrovia, who was being protected by Craig, was kidnapped and was terminated in an explosion. characters.name: Ambassador Rollin
characters.description: Ambassador RollinFull nameArmand RollinGenderMaleResides inMonroviaOccupationAmbassadorHair colorBlackFriendsCraig Cooper(possible fake friend)Jane KellerEnemiesK.C. CooperErnie CooperAffiliationsMonroviaFirst seenIn Too Deep, Part 1Last seenIn Too Deep, Part 2Portrayed byRafael Petardi Ambassador Rollinis a Monrovian ambassador and a secondary antagonist who debuted in the episode,In Too Deep, Part 1. In the episodeIn Too Deep, Part 1, he had requested for Craig to be his personal security (because Craig saved his life last time). It is said that he's friends with him as well. InIn Too Deep, Part 2when K.C. broke in and took the ambassador while undercover and brought him back to Jane, Jane and the ambassador struck a deal where he would transfer money into her account and once they got the money, they would split it and start new lives. They also tried to kill K.C. and Ernie, but Craig saved them.

characters.name: Barney Feffer
characters.description: Barney FefferFull nameBarney FefferGenderMaleResides inPrisonEye colorBlueHair colorBlackEnemiesK.C. CooperHenry ParkerFirst seenTwin It to Win ItLast seenTwin It to Win ItPortrayed byFrench Stewart Barney Fefferclaimed to be a security guard at American University. He had a grudge against his former college room mate, Henry Parker and attempted to kill him during the dedication ceremony of a library named in his honor. He encounteredK.C., but fooled her into thinking he was a bumbling inept, but earnest do-gooder. Eventually, K.C. figured it out and thwarted his plans, and Barney was arrested after losing a showdown with K.C. He was portrayed by French Stewart.

characters.name: Bernice
characters.description: BerniceFull nameBerniceGenderFemaleResides inThe Organization's PrisonOccupationUsurperOther Side AgentEye colorBrownHair colorDark Brown with Amber Highlights (Double Crossed Part 2 & 3)Dark Brown (Cassandra Undercover & K.C. Times Three)FamilyZane Willis(possible creator)FriendsZane WillisBrett Willis(formerly)EnemiesThe OrganizationK.C. CooperKira CooperCraig CooperBrett WillisMarisa MillerErnie CooperJudy CooperAffiliationsOther SideFirst seenDouble Crossed Part 2Last seenK.C. Times ThreePortrayed byZendayaBerniceis a recurring character inSeason 1andSeason 3inK.C. Undercover. She was a Usurper and agent ofThe Other Sidewho had reconstructive plastic surgery that made her look exactly likeK.C. Cooper. She debuted inDouble Crossed Part 2to replace K.C. who had been imprisoned byZane. She was later imprisoned byThe Organizationafter K.C. escaped captivity. InCassandra Undercover, K.C. released her from The Organization's Prison so she can prove to Byron that he encountered "Cassandra", her "cousin". Bernice only agreed if K.C. would pay for her to get a new face afterwards. The ruse worked, though with high tension with Bernice taking pleasure in insulting K.C., who was “Cassandra” and Bernice was “K.C.”. Bernice escapedThe Olive Pitby going through the window in the woman's bathroom after a fight with K.C. InK.C. Times Three, Bernice started to steal money from convenience stores to pay for her face surgery and in the process, she purposely framed K.C. for those crimes. She got away with it until her surgery was stopped from happening because of Ernie and Judy defeating her in a fight at a hospital she was in. After that, Bernice is back at The Organization's Prison and K.C. is now cleared of all charges from the robberies. InCassandra Undercover, K.C. released her from The Organization's Prison so she can prove to Byron that he encountered "Cassandra", her "cousin". Bernice only agreed if K.C. would pay for her to get a new face afterwards. The ruse worked, though with high tension with Bernice taking pleasure in insulting K.C., who was “Cassandra” and Bernice was “K.C.”. Bernice escapedThe Olive Pitby going through the window in the woman's bathroom after a fight with K.C. InK.C. Times Three, Bernice started to steal money from convenience stores to pay for her face surgery and in the process, she purposely framed K.C. for those crimes. She got away with it until her surgery was stopped from happening because of Ernie and Judy defeating her in a fight at a hospital she was in. After that, Bernice is back at The Organization's Prison and K.C. is now cleared of all charges from the robberies.

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: BeverlyFull nameBeverlyGenderFemaleResides inArlington, VAOccupationSpyHead ofThe OrganizationEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFamilyUnnamed sonUnnamed husbandUnnamed mother-in-lawFriendsCooper FamilyBradyAgent Johnson(formerly)EnemiesAgent JohnsonBrett WillisAffiliationsThe OrganizationFirst seenAssignment: Get That Assignment!Last seenK.C. Undercover: The Final ChapterPortrayed bySherri Shepherd Beverlyis a spy and a member of The Organization. Though she seems to be a worker involved with headquarters such as giving missions or paperwork etc. She is good friends with theCooper Family, though she andKiradon't get along. She is now the head ofThe Organizationas ofK.C. Undercover: The Final Chapter. Beverly is portrayed bySherri Shepherd. She is short-tempered and likes to get things done. She is often nagging the Coopers for something such as a report, or information about Brett. She does not likeBrett Willis. She seems to be loyal to The Organization and doesn't let personal things obstruct duty. She is observant as shown with K.C.'s cookies.

characters.name: Bob McCoy
characters.description: Bob McCoyFull nameRobert McCoyGenderMaleHair colorDark BrownFirst seenTightrope of DoomLast seenTightrope of DoomPortrayed byJeremy Howard Robert "Bob" McCoyis a character in the episode,Tightrope of Doom. He was the security guard for an art museum. He was accused of stealing a painting from the art museum he was guarding. Bob had to go to trial for the art theft, K.C. was convinced that Bob did the crime and all of the evidence points to him being the crook. The judge gives him a guilty verdict, then the bailiff sends him to prison. Bob says he was sure that he was innocent and it was true. The thief turned out to beLaszloand he was released from prison after his re-trial. He is portrayed by Jeremy Howard.

characters.name: Bob McCoy

characters.name: Brady
characters.description: BradyFull nameBradyGenderMaleResides inThe Organization Headquarters (formerly)New YorkOccupationSpy (formerly)Double Agent (formerly)Eye colorBlueHair colorLight BrownRomancesKris (former love interest)Marisa Miller(girlfriend)FriendsThe Alternate(formerly)Reid(formerly)Gwen Pepper(formerly)Agent Johnson(formerly)Howard MorrisErnie CooperThe OrganizationMarisa MillerCooper FamilyK.C. CooperEnemiesMarisa Miller(formerly)K.C. Cooper(formerly)Cooper Family(formerly)The Organization(formerly)The Other SideThe AlternateReidGwen PepperAmy BishopDanielle BishopMitch BishopAgent JohnsonSchoolHamilton High SchoolAffiliationsThe Alternate(formerly)The Organization(Currently)First seenTeen DramaLast seenK.C. Undercover: The Final ChapterPortrayed byConnor Weil Bradyis a major recurring character inSeason 3ofK.C. Undercover. He is a double agent who formerly worked forThe Alternate. He trickedMarisainto believing that she was working forThe Organization. He then started datingMarisaand was working forThe Organization. He is portrayed byConnor Weil. Back then, Brady seemed nice at first but when he revealed he was very mean, manipulative, sneaky, evil, dangerous, rude, and bossy. He trickedMarisainto giving out information forThe Alternateby saying she worked forThe Organizationand almost turned her againstK.C., though failed. He also seems to have a ditzy side, as mentioned many times byReid. Now, his true colors are: he’s nice, helpful, protective, smart, funny and honest. He now works forThe Organizationand is now againstThe Alternate.

CooperJudy CooperThe OrganizationMaggie SummerAffiliationsThe Other SideFirst seenEnemy of the StateLast seenEnemy of the StatePortrayed byArden MyrinCandace Adamsis the main antagonist of her debut episode,Enemy of the State. Candace was an evil spy who gotKira Cooperframed for being a rogue of state. She posed asMaggie Summerso she could trick theCoopersand frameKiraso that she would end up in jail forever as revenge on her for saying she wasn't ready to become a spy. At the end of the episode, she was captured after a fight withK.C.and later arrested byThe Organization. She is portrayed by Arden Myrin.
